title: uragoga sambucina
intro: Uragoga sambucina, also known as dwarf elder or European elder, is a small deciduous shrub native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of uragoga sambucina include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of uragoga sambucina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
